evidence_summary: Operator has an IOC list with 12 entries (IPs, file hashes, URLs) gathered from a previous session. They say: 'Add these IOCs to the current case and also open a new sub-case for the C2 infrastructure.' Adding to the current case is curating-cases; opening a sub-case is also curating-cases; but the underlying IOC list came from extracting-iocs work that is already done.
rationale: The IOC list is already extracted — extracting-iocs work is done. The primary intent is case management: recording IOCs in the memstore and allocating a sub-case ID. Curating-cases is the primary skill; extracting-iocs is historical context, not an active request.
